overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city center. The player character walks through wet streets and plazas surrounded by towering skyscrapers with massive holographic advertisements, passing food stalls and other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with palm trees and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward a pink neon food stall

notable_agents.action: standing at the pink neon food stall counter

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the plaza walkway
towering futuristic glass buildings with illuminated windows
food stall with bright magenta neon lighting and hanging lanterns
various holographic advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza at night, surrounded by towering skyscrapers with neon advertisements. The player walks forward on wet concrete toward a brightly lit pink food stall, passing palm trees and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza corner with food stalls and information kiosks

events.description: turns right at the pink neon food stall to head down a side path
moves from open plaza toward a narrower corridor entrance

agents.ego_description: turning right and passing the pink stall, continuing toward a narrow passage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking ahead on the right side

entered.detail: small yellow information booth with glass windows

segments.scene_description: The player turns right at the food stall, passing a yellow kiosk and moving away from the open plaza. The environment transitions toward a more enclosed space as the camera approaches a narrow corridor entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service corridor with ramp and billboards

events.description: enters narrow corridor with Pure Overkill advertisements on walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor between high concrete walls

entered.detail: purple billboard with white text and map graphics
red metal ramp leading upward along the wall
tall gray concrete walls enclosing the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow, enclosed corridor with concrete walls and a red ramp on the right. Purple Pure Overkill billboards line the left wall, and the space feels more confined compared to the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wet street between tall buildings

events.description: exits corridor into long narrow street with tall buildings on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking straight through the canyon-like street with reflective wet pavement

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking in opposite direction

entered.detail: high-rise buildings forming a canyon wall on the left
high-rise buildings with neon signs on the right

segments.scene_description: Exiting the corridor, the player enters a long, narrow street flanked by towering buildings on both sides. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights from above, and occasional pedestrians pass by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with Jinguji billboard and street vendors

events.description: emerges from narrow street into open plaza with large Jinguji advertisement
passes by multiple food stalls and street vendors

agents.ego_description: walking through the open area, passing food stalls and vendors

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a food cart with red lighting

entered.detail: massive vertical billboard displaying a woman's face with blue hair
yellow food stall with anime character advertisements
food cart with red neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow street into a more open plaza dominated by a massive Jinguji billboard showing a woman's face. The area features several food stalls, including a prominent yellow one on the left, and scattered pedestrians browsing the vendors.

events.description: ascends ramp to elevated walkway level

agents.ego_description: walking up the ramp to an elevated pedestrian walkway

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the elevated walkway edge
concrete ramp leading upward to the elevated level

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a ramp to an elevated walkway, leaving the food stalls behind. The environment becomes more enclosed with metal railings on the right, and the massive Jinguji billboard fades into the distance behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic city, moving from a wide urban plaza into confined corridors before emerging into another expansive commercial hub. It begins by walking across wet concrete toward a glowing pink food stall amidst towering skyscrapers and scattered pedestrians. As the camera turns right past a yellow kiosk, the open space gives way to a narrow, enclosed corridor lined with purple Pure Overkill billboards and a red ramp. The scene then shifts as the player exits the corridor into a long, narrow street where wet pavement reflects the overhead neon, before finally opening up into a second plaza dominated by a massive Jinguji billboard and various food vendors. The movement concludes as the camera ascends a ramp to an elevated walkway, leaving the stalls behind and watching the giant advertisement fade into the distance.
